Dear advertisers,
In accordance with Section 15.1 of the TikTok for Business Commercial Terms of Service, we are providing notice of upcoming changes to the TikTok One Creative Services Advertiser Terms of Service. These changes will take effect from 2026-03-24.
The key update includes:
  • Clarify the parties' cancellation rights with respect to orders placed on TikTok One.
  • Clarify the parties' rights and responsibilities with respect to agency rights, when applicable.
  • Clarify the parties' rights and responsibilities with respect to anti-money laundering laws, when applicable.
To review the updated TikTok One Creative Services Advertiser Terms of Service, see complete terms.
Agree

The middle value in the range of views across a creator's recent videos, ranked lowest to highest, which showcases the typical video view count of their content.
How much people interacted with content. It's calculated by taking the total number of comments, likes, and shares divided by its video views.
